/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/adan.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/adan.dir/libs/io/print.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/backend.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/ir/emitter.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/ir/ir.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/ir/opt.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/linker/linker.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/llvm/llvm_emitter.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/llvm/llvm_types.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/llvm/llvm_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/backend/lower.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/ast/tree.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/parser/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/parser/parser_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/scanner/scanner.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/scanner/token.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/semantics/semantic.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/frontend/semantics/validator.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/helper.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/adan.dir/src/stm.c.o -o adan  src/backend/linker/libadan_linker.a
